evals.expected_output: Runs transcribe.py with the file path and prints the plain-text transcript to stdout using the default large-v3-turbo model
assertions: does not save to file unless asked

evals.expected_output: Runs transcribe.py with --format srt and --output video.srt, then confirms the file was saved

evals.prompt: Translate this French audio to English: french.mp3
evals.expected_output: Runs transcribe.py with --translate flag and presents the English translation

evals.prompt: What did they say in this audio?
evals.expected_output: Asks the user for the audio file path before running the script — does not guess or hallucinate content
assertions: does not run script without input
